args.query: SELECT ch.caseid__c, ch.field__c, COUNT(*) as assignment_count FROM "casehistory__c" ch WHERE ch.createddate >= '2023-05-02' AND ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment' GROUP BY ch.caseid__c, ch.field__c

exec_args.sql: SELECT ch.caseid__c, ch.field__c, COUNT(*) as assignment_count FROM "casehistory__c" ch WHERE ch.createddate >= '2023-05-02' AND ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment' GROUP BY ch.caseid__c, ch.field__c

args.query:
SELECT 
    c.id,
    c.ownerid,
    c.createddate,
    c.closeddate,
    c.status
FROM "Case" c
WHERE c.createddate >= '2023-05-02'
    AND c.closeddate != 'None'
    AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL

exec_args.sql:
SELECT 
    c.id,
    c.ownerid,
    c.createddate,
    c.closeddate,
    c.status
FROM "Case" c
WHERE c.createddate >= '2023-05-02'
    AND c.closeddate != 'None'
    AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL

var_functions.query_db:2.subject: Feature Update Notifications Lack
var_functions.query_db:2.description: Without regular update notifications, we are unable to fully utilize CollabCircuit Hub's latest features.

var_functions.query_db:2.subject: Missing Feature Update Alerts
var_functions.query_db:2.description: I have noticed that I am not consistently receiving notifications about new feature updates for the SecureFlow Suite, which affects my ability to use the software to its full potential.

var_functions.query_db:2.subject: Delayed Support Response
var_functions.query_db:2.description: I am experiencing delays in getting timely responses from TechPulse support during busy periods, which is affecting our project timelines.

var_functions.query_db:2.subject: AI Feature Malfunction
var_functions.query_db:2.description: Some of the AI-powered features in CloudLink Designer are intermittently failing to operate, leading to reduced efficiency and user frustration.

var_functions.query_db:2.subject: Access Issues with Training Module
var_functions.query_db:2.description: I am experiencing difficulty accessing the online training modules which are crucial for my team's smooth adoption of the SecureFlow Suite.

var_functions.query_db:2.subject: Slow Reply from Support Team
var_functions.query_db:2.description: The delay in obtaining a prompt response from the TechPulse support team is causing frustration and hindering our team's efficiency.

var_functions.query_db:2.subject: Scaling Difficulties
var_functions.query_db:2.description: We are struggling to effectively scale the AI DesignShift solution, affecting our operational expansion, and we require assistance.

var_functions.query_db:2.subject: EcoPCB Data Integration Error
var_functions.query_db:2.description: I am facing issues integrating EcoPCB Creator with third-party applications, which is causing disruptions in project workflows.

var_functions.query_db:2.subject: Customization Issue
var_functions.query_db:2.description: I find it difficult to adapt the AI Cirku-Tech platform to my company's very specialized circuit design requirements despite the customization features available.

var_functions.query_db:2.subject: Scalability Issue
var_functions.query_db:2.description: I am facing challenges in scaling the OptiPower Manager to meet my organization's growing demands, hindering our expansion efforts.

args.query:
WITH case_assignments AS (
  SELECT 
    ch.caseid__c,
    COUNT(*) as assignment_count
  FROM "casehistory__c" ch
  WHERE ch.createddate >= '2023-05-02'
    AND ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
  GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
),
cases_with_handle_time AS (
  SELECT 
    c.id as case_id,
    c.ownerid,
    c.createddate,
    c.closeddate,
    CASE 
      WHEN c.closeddate != 'None' AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL 
      THEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate::timestamp - c.createddate::timestamp)) / 3600.0
      ELSE NULL 
    END as handle_time_hours
  FROM "Case" c
  WHERE c.createddate >= '2023-05-02'
)
SELECT 
  c.ownerid,
  COUNT(c.case_id) as cases_processed,
  AVG(c.handle_time_hours) as avg_handle_time_hours
FROM cases_with_handle_time c
JOIN case_assignments ca ON c.case_id = ca.caseid__c
WHERE ca.assignment_count = 1
  AND c.handle_time_hours IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY c.ownerid
HAVING COUNT(c.case_id) > 1
ORDER BY avg_handle_time_hours ASC
LIMIT 20

exec_args.sql:
WITH case_assignments AS (
  SELECT 
    ch.caseid__c,
    COUNT(*) as assignment_count
  FROM "casehistory__c" ch
  WHERE ch.createddate >= '2023-05-02'
    AND ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
  GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
),
cases_with_handle_time AS (
  SELECT 
    c.id as case_id,
    c.ownerid,
    c.createddate,
    c.closeddate,
    CASE 
      WHEN c.closeddate != 'None' AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL 
      THEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate::timestamp - c.createddate::timestamp)) / 3600.0
      ELSE NULL 
    END as handle_time_hours
  FROM "Case" c
  WHERE c.createddate >= '2023-05-02'
)
SELECT 
  c.ownerid,
  COUNT(c.case_id) as cases_processed,
  AVG(c.handle_time_hours) as avg_handle_time_hours
FROM cases_with_handle_time c
JOIN case_assignments ca ON c.case_id = ca.caseid__c
WHERE ca.assignment_count = 1
  AND c.handle_time_hours IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY c.ownerid
HAVING COUNT(c.case_id) > 1
ORDER BY avg_handle_time_hours ASC
LIMIT 20

args.query:
SELECT 
  c.id,
  c.ownerid,
  c.createddate,
  c.closeddate
FROM "Case" c
WHERE c.createddate >= '2023-05-02'
  AND c.closeddate != 'None'
  AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM "casehistory__c" ch2
    WHERE ch2.caseid__c = c.id
      AND ch2.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
      AND ch2.createddate >= '2023-05-02'
    HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
  )
ORDER BY c.ownerid
LIMIT 50

exec_args.sql:
SELECT 
  c.id,
  c.ownerid,
  c.createddate,
  c.closeddate
FROM "Case" c
WHERE c.createddate >= '2023-05-02'
  AND c.closeddate != 'None'
  AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM "casehistory__c" ch2
    WHERE ch2.caseid__c = c.id
      AND ch2.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
      AND ch2.createddate >= '2023-05-02'
    HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
  )
ORDER BY c.ownerid
LIMIT 50

args.query:
WITH non_transferred_cases AS (
  -- Get cases created in past 4 months that are not transferred (only 1 owner assignment)
  SELECT 
    c.id,
    c.ownerid,
    c.createddate,
    c.closeddate
  FROM "Case" c
  WHERE c.createddate >= '2023-05-02'
    AND c.closeddate != 'None'
    AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.ownerid IS NOT NULL
    AND NOT EXISTS (
      -- Exclude cases with more than 1 owner assignment
      SELECT 1 FROM "casehistory__c" ch
      WHERE ch.caseid__c = c.id
        AND ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
      GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
      HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
    )
),
handle_times AS (
  -- Calculate handle time in hours for each non-transferred case
  SELECT 
    ownerid,
    id as case_id,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closeddate::timestamp - createddate::timestamp)) / 3600.0 as handle_time_hours
  FROM non_transferred_cases
)
SELECT 
  ownerid,
  COUNT(*) as cases_processed,
  AVG(handle_time_hours) as avg_handle_time_hours
FROM handle_times
GROUP BY ownerid
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY avg_handle_time_hours ASC
LIMIT 10

exec_args.sql:
WITH non_transferred_cases AS (
  -- Get cases created in past 4 months that are not transferred (only 1 owner assignment)
  SELECT 
    c.id,
    c.ownerid,
    c.createddate,
    c.closeddate
  FROM "Case" c
  WHERE c.createddate >= '2023-05-02'
    AND c.closeddate != 'None'
    AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.ownerid IS NOT NULL
    AND NOT EXISTS (
      -- Exclude cases with more than 1 owner assignment
      SELECT 1 FROM "casehistory__c" ch
      WHERE ch.caseid__c = c.id
        AND ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
      GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
      HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
    )
),
handle_times AS (
  -- Calculate handle time in hours for each non-transferred case
  SELECT 
    ownerid,
    id as case_id,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closeddate::timestamp - createddate::timestamp)) / 3600.0 as handle_time_hours
  FROM non_transferred_cases
)
SELECT 
  ownerid,
  COUNT(*) as cases_processed,
  AVG(handle_time_hours) as avg_handle_time_hours
FROM handle_times
GROUP BY ownerid
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY avg_handle_time_hours ASC
LIMIT 10
